name: nightreign-saves-seamless-to-steam
description: Helps user to automatically migrate Steam saves to SeamlessCoop or viceversa
author: Alexander Armua <alexanderarmua1@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run bundle && pkg dist/main.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output SaveManager.exe
scripts.build:windows: npm run bundle && pkg dist/main.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output SaveManager.exe
scripts.build:mac: npm run bundle && pkg dist/main.cjs --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output SaveManager-mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run bundle && pkg dist/main.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output SaveManager-linux
